sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 17.60 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.17)

statement.latex: Given a set \( \) of odd primes, let \({ CT}_{ }( )\) denote the subgroup of \({ CT}( )\) which is generated by all class transpositions which interchange residue classes whose moduli have only prime factors in \( \{2\}\). The groups \({ CT}_{ }( )\) are simple (Math. Z., { 264}, no.\,4 (2010), 927--938). Are they pairwise nonisomorphic? { S.\,Kohl}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
